meaning: n.有长牙的动物(如象、海象、野猪等)
examples: But if people don't heed to our advice and harass the tusker, then it can retaliate.
Excellent are well-trained mules, thoroughbred Sindhu horses and noble tusker elephants. But better still is the man who has subdued himself.
Even the cheapest imported whiskies are pricier than Kenya's excellent beers (such as Diageo's Tusker).
Tusker of Kenya, who are the defending champions, kick-off their campaign on Wednesday with a game against Hay-al-Arab of Sudan.
